meta..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostId').val() == auth.uid) || data.child('hostId').val() == auth.uid || root.child('lobbies').child($code).child('meta').child('hostId').val() == auth.uid)

$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['name','team','role','ready']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 18 && (newData.child('team').val() == 'blue' || newData.child('team').val() == 'orange') && (newData.child('role').val() == 'goalkeeper' || newData.child('role').val() == 'defence' || newData.child('role').val() == 'midfield' || newData.child('role').val() == 'attack') && newData.child('ready').isBoolean())
